params.prompt:
Create a high-fidelity 16:9 UI concept image for the first-run onboarding/tutorial overlay of the web lyric app "湖のソナーレ".

Use the attached screenshot as the exact app UI reference. Preserve the existing app screenshot composition and UI components as much as possible:
- Keep the right SONARE SOUNDMARK panel in the same visual style, size, position, typography, transparent glass material, close button, scrollbar, tags, and source text layout.
- Keep the top-left vertical lyric guide exactly as vertical Japanese Mincho text, with the same position and line structure.
- Keep the bottom music player as the same thin liquid-glass rail, with the same controls, progress bar, song selector, time, and volume area.
- Keep the water soundmark note symbols in their current subtle form.
- Keep the torii, lake, sky, and reflection composition. Do not invent a different panel, timeline, side card, or lyric format.

Add only a refined tutorial/onboarding layer above the existing UI:
- A very subtle transparent dark veil over the scene, not opaque. Existing UI must remain clearly visible.
- Add 3 or 4 thin elegant curved leader lines and small liquid-glass callout labels. The labels should explain the existing UI but should not replace or redraw it.
- Point one callout to the vertical lyric guide: Korean title "가사 가이드", small text "소절 단위로 흐름을 따라갑니다".
- Point one callout to the water markers: title "소나레 노트", small text "물 위 표식으로 테마 정보를 수집합니다".
- Point one callout to the right soundmark panel: title "테마 패널", small text "표식을 누르면 호수와 음악의 정보를 확인합니다".
- Point one callout to the bottom player: title "재생 컨트롤", small text "곡 선택, 진행, 볼륨을 조절합니다".
- Add a compact page indicator and two tiny glass buttons near the lower-right area above the bottom player: "1 / 4", "건너뛰기", "다음".

Style direction: premium liquid glass, quiet luminous outlines, poetic Japanese lake atmosphere, minimal annotation, no dashboard look.

Strict negative instructions:
- Do not redesign the soundmark panel.
- Do not add a new right-side card layout.
- Do not turn the lyric guide into a timeline or horizontal list.
- Do not add debug hatching, debug labels, or exclusion-zone boxes.
- Do not cover the torii gate or obscure the bottom player.
